ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "handicap" REAL /* Player's golf handicap */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the team joined the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the team (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number in the tournament */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being played */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "tee_time" TEXT /* Scheduled tee time for the round */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournament ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course */,
  "holes" INTEGER /* Number of holes on the course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par score for the course */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the course in yards or meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player in the round */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the round */,
  "hole_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each hole (e.g., JSON array) */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Penalties incurred during the round */,
  "time_played" TEXT /* Duration it took to complete the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the leaderboard entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Player's total score */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Player's current position on the leaderboard */,
  "current_round" INTEGER /* Current round for the leaderboard entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournament ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (e.g., professional, amateur) */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament director */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" INTEGER /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
